title: Denis' Wild Adventure
description: A lightweight neoforge 1.21.1 minecraft modpack. It is a mix of exploration and magic.
body:
Welcome to Denis' Wild Adventure. 
This is a modpack for those looking for a lightweight vanilla+ mod pack. This modpack contains a variety of mods made to make the game run better. These mods include lithium, ferrite core, entity culling and many others. This mod includes plenty of new structures for those looking to explore the world. With Moog's mods this world is filled with new structures to fulfill the urge to explore. If you are looking to delve into the secrets of the world there is plenty to learn, with Ars Nouveau, Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks, Mahou Tsuki, and Psi. This modpack also includes Farmer's Delight, Aquaculture, Terralith, and Biomes of Plenty for those who wish to plunder the land and taste all there is to taste. For those nomads, there are Xaero's maps and sophisticated backpacks. 
What are you waiting for, go out there and explore the world.
(This Modpack is in beta, so changes will be made)

Please use at least 4096mb of RAM, as otherwise sometimes the world creation can cause crashing. If you have issues with distant horizons, please increase RAM or disable it.  If you have any issues, feel free to contact me. I will do my best to fix them.
